top_signals.title: JPMorgan Builds AI Agents That Beat 60/40 Portfolio in Backtests
top_signals.summary: As investors increasingly turn to artificial intelligence for help with everything from stock picking to risk management, JPMorgan Chase & Co. has been testing whether a model can do something more ambitious: allocate money itself.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Multinationals still avoiding UK tax after US opts out of reforms, MPs warn
top_signals.summary: New global ‘pillar 2’ rules require companies to pay top-up levies
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Palo Alto CEO Arora says AI pricing needs to fall 90% as token costs skyrocket
top_signals.summary: Palo Alto Networks CEO Nikesh Arora said high token costs could prevent businesses from adopting artificial intelligence at scale.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Fujimori legacy shows limits of Trump’s push against China in Peru
top_signals.summary: Keiko Fujimori will have to navigate her father's legacy as U.S. President Donald Trump seeks to reassert U.S. dominance in the Western Hemisphere.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: ECB Officials Couldn’t Overlook Energy Shock in June - WSJ
top_signals.summary: ECB Officials Couldn’t Overlook Energy Shock in June  WSJ
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.
